label: day100_1_afternoon_boredom
menu_text: In the walnut bureau drawer. [[Search the bureau: +15 Inspiration, +10 Corruption]]

label: day100_1_afternoon_boredom
menu_text: By the parlour settee. [[Search the parlour entrance: +15 Corruption]]

label: day100_2_reconvergence
menu_text: Lie — I was seeking a draft in the study. [[Careful posture]]

label: day100_2_reconvergence
menu_text: Deflect — they are my pages. [[Eager posture]]

label: day100_2_reconvergence
menu_text: Submit — throw myself on his mercy. [[Desperate posture]]

label: day100_2_reconvergence
menu_text: For the shillings home. [[+5 Inspiration]]

label: day100_2_reconvergence
menu_text: To catalogue what power hides. [[+5 Inspiration, +5 Corruption]]

label: day100_2_reconvergence
menu_text: Because scandal tastes better than porridge. [[+10 Corruption]]

label: day100_3_night_daydream
menu_text: By becoming unseen, listening, and moving through the gaps. [[Ghost Focus: +1 Ghost]]

label: day100_3_night_daydream
menu_text: By reading the threat, appeasing them, and redirecting the danger. [[Prey Focus: +1 Prey]]

label: day100_3_night_daydream
menu_text: By testing their boundaries, baiting them, and beginning to use them as material. [[Predator Focus: +1 Predator]]

label: day101_1_morning_interview
menu_text: Lower my eyes. Let her mistake fear for obedience.

label: day101_1_morning_interview
menu_text: Answer cleanly. Let competence do what meekness cannot.

label: day101_1_morning_interview
menu_text: Lower my chin, allowing her fingers to adjust the fabric, matching her slow rhythm.

label: day101_1_morning_interview
menu_text: Stand perfectly rigid, holding my breath to mask my pulse, letting her treat me like a mannequin.

label: day101_1_morning_interview
menu_text: Meet her gaze directly through the closeness, accepting the intrusion with a steady pulse.

label: day101_1_morning_interview
menu_text: Lower my head, speaking with flat utility: 'I will keep my head down, Ma'am.'

label: day101_1_morning_interview
menu_text: Keep my tone even, professional, and empty: 'I only see the work, Ma'am.'

label: day101_1_morning_interview
menu_text: Meet her eyes with quiet audacity: 'I know how to keep secrets, Ma'am—and those of the house.'

label: day101_1_vance_throws_toy
menu_text: Lower my chin, offering the bottle with a humble, trembling maid's hand. [[Subservient: +Suspicion]]

label: day101_1_vance_throws_toy
menu_text: Stand straight and meet her gaze directly, holding the bottle between us. [[Defiant: +Tension, +Inspiration, +Corruption]]

label: day101_1_vance_throws_toy
menu_text: Offer it on my flat palm with a cold, blank face. [[Ghostly: +Inspiration]]

label: day101_1_vance_dressing_room
menu_text: Handle the lace with gentle, soothing fingers, easing the pressure. [[Protected: +Suspicion]]

label: day101_1_vance_dressing_room
menu_text: Touch the red pressure mark left on her collarbone by Gideon. [[Intimate: +Tension, +Suspicion, +Corruption]]

label: day101_1_vance_dressing_room
menu_text: Perform the duty with cold, clinical precision. [[Observed: +Inspiration]]

label: day101_1_vance_stairwell_encounter
menu_text: Assure her of my absolute maid's silence. [[Loyal Witness: +Suspicion]]

label: day101_1_vance_stairwell_encounter
menu_text: Feed her anxiety, turning the power dynamics. [[Accomplice: +Tension, +Suspicion, +Corruption]]

label: day101_1_vance_stairwell_encounter
menu_text: Detach myself and push past her. [[Silent Observer: +Inspiration]]

label: day101_2_coras_path_choice
menu_text: Let Missy's concern open the door. [[Predator path: +Inspiration, +Corruption]]

label: day101_2_coras_path_choice
menu_text: Look for myself. [[Prey path: +Inspiration, +Suspicion]]

label: day101_2_coras_path_choice
menu_text: Pull Missy away. [[Ghost path: +Inspiration, -Suspicion]]

label: day101_night_story_window
menu_text: Write the first chapter of my manuscript. [[Progress manuscript]]

label: day101_night_story_window
menu_text: Listen for Miss Stern's keys in the west corridor.

label: day101_night_story_window
menu_text: Find Missy before the laundry goes cold.

label: day101_night_story_window
menu_text: Walk the guest wing where Mr. Locke's shoe still has authority.

label: day101_night_story_window
menu_text: Stay at the desk and let the ink dry. [[Rest and reflect]]

label: day101_night_story_window
menu_text: Order. Safety in structure. [[Inspiration]]

label: day101_night_story_window
menu_text: Exposure. Safety in knowing the threat. [[Corruption]]

label: day101_4_write_the_chapter
menu_text: Frame it with order and structure. I must write what is safe. [[Inspiration]]

label: day101_4_write_the_chapter
menu_text: Frame it with exposure and appetite. I must write the truth. [[Corruption]]

label: day102_2_day2_chore_time
menu_text: Work fast. Catalogue the room, the people, the risk. [[Inspiration]]

label: day102_2_day2_chore_time
menu_text: Linger near the danger. Let the secret sharpen itself. [[Corruption]]

label: day102_afternoon_story_window
menu_text: Let Miss Stern find me near the linen closet.

label: day102_afternoon_story_window
menu_text: Steal an hour with Missy before Stern counts the sheets.

label: day102_afternoon_story_window
menu_text: Drift toward the Locke Suite and watch who performs for whom.

label: day102_afternoon_story_window
menu_text: Push the cart on and keep my hands honest.

label: day102_3_coras_choice
menu_text: Confess enough to control the damage. [[Prey: visible risk, cleanest conscience]]

label: day102_3_coras_choice
menu_text: Produce it as if discovering it now. [[Predator: controlled lie]]

label: day102_3_coras_choice
menu_text: Let Missy take the shape of the blame. [[Ghost: clean hands, dirty outcome]]

label: day102_4_night
menu_text: Write. Turn the suite into fiction before it rots. [[Manuscript progress]]

label: day102_4_night
menu_text: Do not write. Stay inside the feeling a little longer. [[Indulgence]]

label: day103_1_servants_corridor
menu_text: Order. Safety in structure. [[Inspiration]]

label: day103_1_servants_corridor
menu_text: Exposure. Safety in knowing the threat. [[Corruption]]

label: day103_1_optional_character_chain
menu_text: Follow Stern's discipline before the guest wing wakes.

label: day103_1_optional_character_chain
menu_text: Find Missy while the house is still bruised from yesterday.

label: day103_1_optional_character_chain
menu_text: Watch the Locke Suite door before the tea order becomes a summons.

label: day103_1_optional_character_chain
menu_text: Keep moving with the cart and give no one a reason.

label: day103_2_suite_cora_vs_gideon
menu_text: Answer like a craftsman. Describe what is visible, not what is wanted. [[Inspiration]]

label: day103_2_suite_cora_vs_gideon
menu_text: Let him see that I understand the charge in the room. [[Corruption]]

label: day103_2_suite_cora_vs_gideon
menu_text: Retreat into the maid's mask. Drop the brush. [[Suspicion + Inspiration]]

label: day103_3_bedroom_cora_frantic_writing_event
menu_text: Write with whatever time is left. [[Frantic Write]]

label: day103_3_bedroom_cora_frantic_writing_event
menu_text: Prepare my uniform and mask. [[Prepare Mask]]

label: day103_3_bedroom_cora_frantic_writing_event
menu_text: Re-read the dangerous words. [[Indulge Words]]

label: day103_4_room_stern_suspicion
menu_text: Be boring. Make the summons sound like ordinary service. [[-Suspicion]]

label: day103_4_room_stern_suspicion
menu_text: Tell a partial truth. Admit he unsettles me. [[+Inspiration, mixed risk]]

label: day103_4_room_stern_suspicion
menu_text: Play stupid. Make her underestimate me. [[+Suspicion if she sees through it]]

label: day103_2_suite_night_tea
menu_text: Deny him access. Keep the book mine. [[Defiance]]

label: day103_2_suite_night_tea
menu_text: Offer him a controlled fragment. Make curiosity serve me. [[Bargain]]

label: day103_2_suite_night_tea
menu_text: Let him frighten me. Gather every detail. [[Surrender]]

label: day103_3_bedroom_final_write
menu_text: Write until the candle dies. [[Chapter gate]]

label: day103_3_bedroom_final_write
menu_text: Do not write. Barricade the door and wait for morning. [[Safety over progress]]

label: day104_2_return_early
menu_text: Hide in the cold hearth. Keep the evidence. [[Ghost escape: high suspicion]]

label: day104_2_return_early
menu_text: Stand in the room and lie cleanly. Keep the evidence. [[Prey escape: high visibility]]

label: day104_2_return_early
menu_text: Use Missy as cover. Lose the evidence, preserve the alibi. [[Predator escape: low suspicion, moral cost]]

label: day104_3_stern_pressure
menu_text: Give her the boring servant answer. [[-Suspicion]]

label: day104_3_stern_pressure
menu_text: Let her see I am frightened, not guilty. [[+Inspiration, small suspicion]]

label: day104_3_stern_pressure
menu_text: Hide behind Missy if she was used. [[Conditional moral cost]]

label: day104_4_twilight_ledger_false_dawn
menu_text: Perform visible penance to lower their guard. [[Atonement]]

label: day104_4_twilight_ledger_false_dawn
menu_text: Risk the dark room to write the triumphant chapter. [[Triumphant Write]]

label: day104_4_twilight_ledger_false_dawn
menu_text: Find Missy and salvage what remains of her trust. [[Missy Repair]]

label: day104_4_missy_repair
menu_text: Give her the raw, romantic truth. Offer my vulnerability. [[Tender Romance / Path B Intimacy]]

label: day104_4_missy_repair
menu_text: Keep the truth. Offer a coward's comfort. [[Guarded Distance]]

label: day105_4_why_did_you_do_it
menu_text: To finish the book. [[Observer / Muse]]

label: day105_4_why_did_you_do_it
menu_text: To stand where you stand. [[Predator / Protégé]]

label: day105_4_why_did_you_do_it
menu_text: Because you frightened me, and I needed something that frightened you back. [[Prey / Adversary]]

label: day105_4_why_did_you_do_it
menu_text: Because people like you survive by not being seen. [[Ghost / Witness]]

label: day105_5_gideon_marks_cora
menu_text: Take it. Survival first. [[Pragmatic entanglement]]

label: day105_5_gideon_marks_cora
menu_text: Refuse it. Keep one clean line. [[Defiant poverty]]

label: day105_5_gideon_marks_cora
menu_text: Leave it untouched, but remember where he placed it. [[Ghost option]]

label: stern_chain_1
menu_text: Lower my head and act like a simple, stupid country girl. [[Shed Suspicion / Break Chain]]

label: stern_chain_1
menu_text: Explain the geometry of the fold, meeting her gaze. [[Lean Into Tension / Progress Chain]]

label: stern_chain_2
menu_text: Apologize and call it a spelling exercise. [[Shed Suspicion / Break Chain]]

label: stern_chain_2
menu_text: Hold the notebook tight. Read her a scandalous anonymous passage. [[Progress Chain]]

label: stern_chain_3
menu_text: Play the blind servant, turning away from her gaze. [[Shed Suspicion / Lost Opportunity: Safe option, but you lose this climax forever.]]

label: stern_chain_3
menu_text: Seize the one-time opportunity: Step into her space and audit the stubs. [[Climax: 2.2 Spice. Spikes Suspicion (+25) and Corruption (+20), raising Anxiety. Requires: Anxiety < 75 and Stern Suspicion < 80]]

label: stern_chain_3
menu_text: Seize the one-time opportunity... [[Locked: Anxiety too high (>= 75) or Suspicion too high (>= 80). Choosing this would trigger an immediate breakdown or public dismissal.]]

label: missy_chain_1
menu_text: Help her stitch it silently. Comfort her. [[Shed Suspicion / Break Chain]]

label: missy_chain_1
menu_text: Stroke her cheek, questioning her with tender, quiet romance. [[Progress Chain]]

label: missy_chain_2
menu_text: Tell her to keep quiet for her own safety. [[Shed Suspicion / Break Chain]]

label: missy_chain_2
menu_text: Press her chest-to-chest in the dark, whispering with sensual agency. [[Progress Chain]]

label: missy_chain_3
menu_text: Tear the page and beg her forgiveness. [[Shed Suspicion / Lost Opportunity: Safe option, but you lose this climax forever.]]

label: missy_chain_3
menu_text: Seize the one-time opportunity: Defend the writing and unlace her apron. [[Climax: 2.2 Spice. Spikes Suspicion (+20) and Corruption (+20), raising Anxiety. Requires: Anxiety < 75 and Missy Suspicion < 80]]

label: missy_chain_3
menu_text: Seize the one-time opportunity... [[Locked: Anxiety too high (>= 75) or Suspicion too high (>= 80). Choosing this would trigger an immediate breakdown or public dismissal.]]

label: vance_chain_1
menu_text: Return it silently with a perfect maid's bow. [[Shed Suspicion / Break Chain]]

label: vance_chain_1
menu_text: Cover it with my shoe, sliding it into my apron. [[Progress Chain]]

label: vance_chain_2
menu_text: Slip past silently in the shadows. [[Shed Suspicion / Break Chain]]

label: vance_chain_2
menu_text: Confront her. Wipe a tear with my rough thumb. [[Progress Chain]]

label: vance_chain_3
menu_text: Play the simple country maid to allay her fears. [[Shed Suspicion / Lost Opportunity: Safe option, but you lose this climax forever.]]

label: vance_chain_3
menu_text: Seize the one-time opportunity: Corner her against the vanity and audit her collar marks. [[Climax: 2.2 Spice. Spikes Suspicion (+20) and Corruption (+20), raising Anxiety. Requires: Anxiety < 75 and Vance Suspicion < 80]]

label: vance_chain_3
menu_text: Seize the one-time opportunity... [[Locked: Anxiety too high (>= 75) or Suspicion too high (>= 80). Choosing this would trigger an immediate breakdown or public dismissal.]]
